implementation_notes: Implemented --copy-graphiti flag for guardkit init CLI command. Three main additions: (1) _find_source_graphiti_config() walks up from cwd.parent (not cwd itself) to find an existing .guardkit/graphiti.yaml, using the imported _find_project_root() from guardkit.knowledge.config, or handles an explicit path with tilde expansion. (2) copy_graphiti_config() loads source YAML, replaces project_id with the normalized new name, and writes the full config to the target directory. (3) _cmd_init() accepts an optional copy_graphiti parameter - when set, it tries the copy approach first and falls back to write_graphiti_config() if the source is not found or if the copy fails. The Click option uses a simple string option (no flag_value approach since Click 8 does not support bare optional-value string options) - users pass --copy-graphiti auto for auto-discovery or --copy-graphiti /path/to/project for explicit path.
concerns: The task description suggested a Click pattern with is_flag=False and flag_value='auto' to allow bare --copy-graphiti (no value) to mean auto-discovery. This does not work in Click 8.3 - a string option always requires a value. The implemented interface uses --copy-graphiti auto (explicit keyword) or --copy-graphiti /path. This is slightly different from the suggested pattern but is correct Click 8 behavior. An alternative would be a boolean --copy-graphiti flag plus a separate --copy-graphiti-from PATH option, but the single combined option is cleaner.

The tilde expansion test creates a real directory in the user's home directory during testing. It cleans up in a finally block. An alternative would be to mock os.path.expanduser, but patching pathlib.Path.expanduser is complex. The current approach is reliable.
requirements_addressed: Add --copy-graphiti Click option to the init command
Auto-discovery: search parent directories for .guardkit/graphiti.yaml using _find_project_root() pattern
When source config found: load it, replace project_id, write full config to target
When source config NOT found: warn and fall back to write_graphiti_config()
Accept clean yaml.dump output (comments not preserved)

completion_promises.criterion_text: Add --copy-graphiti Click option to the init command that takes an optional path argument (default: auto-discover)
completion_promises.evidence: Added --copy-graphiti string option to the init Click command. Auto-discovery uses 'auto' as the value keyword; explicit paths are also accepted. Integrated into _cmd_init() with copy_graphiti parameter.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Auto-discovery: search parent directories of cwd for an existing .guardkit/graphiti.yaml using the existing _find_project_root() pattern
completion_promises.evidence: _find_source_graphiti_config() imports _find_project_root from guardkit.knowledge.config and calls it with cwd.parent (not cwd itself) to avoid picking up the target project's own config.

completion_promises.criterion_text: When source config found: load it, replace project_id with the new normalized project name, write full config to target
completion_promises.evidence: copy_graphiti_config() loads source YAML with yaml.safe_load, replaces config_data['project_id'] with normalize_project_id(project_name), and writes to target/.guardkit/graphiti.yaml using yaml.dump.

completion_promises.criterion_text: When source config NOT found: warn and fall back to current behavior (write project_id only)
completion_promises.evidence: In _cmd_init(), when _find_source_graphiti_config returns None, a warning is printed and write_graphiti_config() is called as fallback. Same fallback occurs when copy_graphiti_config() returns False.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Accept clean yaml.dump output (comments not preserved)
completion_promises.evidence: copy_graphiti_config() uses yaml.dump() with default_flow_style=False and sort_keys=False, consistent with write_graphiti_config().

completion_promises.criterion_text: The explicit path form --copy-graphiti ~/path/to/project should also work
completion_promises.evidence: _find_source_graphiti_config() calls Path(copy_graphiti).expanduser().resolve() for explicit paths, enabling ~ expansion. Test test_explicit_path_expands_home_tilde verifies this.
